title: OpenAI Raises $122B
summary: OpenAI has secured $122 billion in new funding to expand its AI capabilities globally. This investment will support the development of next-generation compute and meet growing demand for its AI models.
body:
OpenAI has announced a significant funding round, raising $122 billion to accelerate the next phase of AI development. This investment will be used to expand the company's frontier AI capabilities globally, with a focus on developing next-generation compute infrastructure. 

 The funding will also support the growing demand for OpenAI's popular models, including ChatGPT and Codex, as well as its enterprise AI solutions. This investment is a testament to the rapid growth and adoption of AI technologies, and OpenAI's position as a leader in the field. 

 As OpenAI continues to push the boundaries of AI development, this funding will enable the company to explore new applications and innovations, driving further advancements in the industry. With this significant investment, OpenAI is poised to play an even more significant role in shaping the future of AI.
twitterThread: 🚀 OpenAI just raised $122 BILLION in new funding! 🤯
Here's why this matters: OpenAI is poised to revolutionize the AI landscape with its next-generation compute infrastructure. Think faster, more powerful models.
The wild part: This funding will support the growing demand for ChatGPT, Codex, and enterprise AI solutions. Get ready for AI to become even more ubiquitous.
Let that sink in: $122 billion is one of the largest funding rounds in history. This changes everything for OpenAI and the AI industry as a whole.
This changes everything for the future of AI. OpenAI is now positioned to drive innovation and advancements like never before.
standaloneTweet: OpenAI raises $122 BILLION to accelerate AI development! This funding will drive next-gen compute, meet growing demand for ChatGPT & Codex, and revolutionize the AI landscape. https://ainformed.dev/articles/openai-raises-122b
